content: isexecutable  Table of contents Prototype: isexecutable(filename) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the named object filename has execution rights for the current user. Arguments: filename : string - File object name - in the range: "?(/.*) Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "yes" expression => isexecutable ( "/bin/ls" ); reports : yes :: "/bin/ls is an executable file" ; } Output: code R: /bin/ls is an executable file History: Was introduced in version 3.1.0b1,Nova 2.0.0b1 (2010)
title: isexecutable
